brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers have a clear pain point — jitters, crashes, and dependency — and Tulsi Green Tea positions itself as the calm, clean alternative, making a problem-solution angle the most direct path to conversion.
copyOptions.visual_description: Clean studio-style product comparison on a warm off-white background: the Organica Tulsi Green Tea box is sharp and fully lit in the foreground-right, rendered in rich natural greens with clear label detail. In the background-left, a generic coffee jar sits blurred and desaturated to a muted grey, visually receding into irrelevance. Soft diffused overhead lighting, minimal shadows, clinical yet warm mood with a gentle botanical leaf or two resting near the hero product to reinforce freshness.
subheadlines: Most coffees spike your cortisol and leave you depleted. Organica Tulsi Green Tea gives you calm, clean energy — no crash, no compromise.
Coffee gives energy with a price tag of jitters and anxiety. Organica Tulsi Green Tea soothes and energizes, naturally and gently.
The average coffee drinker crashes by 11am. Organica Tulsi Green Tea delivers steady, adaptogen-powered calm from the very first sip.
